title: Bra0boyy's Texture
description: I created a texture pack where I changes a few things
body:
This my first texture pack and I changed a few things like the logs, planks, ore, little gui and the basik tools. 
![planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e082c0bcdfd699094f3a0d1e6337c9ea2415c4_0.webp)

If you want to contact me join my discord.

( [Join discord](https://discord.gg/ked8s7THgK) )




I changed all wodden tools,
all stone tools,
all golden tools,
all iron tools,
all diamond tools
and all netherite tools
![tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c3d15536d7a880643be9cc9843c82c005591aab_0.webp)
![more tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/430f6ea09eb9f0a424d5c2cccf8ec801a5aaf31c_0.webp)

Purple ender pearl and purple ender eye

All logs except the nether ones![Logs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daaf365958b3f1e2694d52389f5e4402fde9e5a5.png)


All planks


Cleaner wools

Cleaner glass

Hot-bar, xp-bar, inventory.

3D totem and Ladder

Creeper and Zombie

New sounds for cow, pig and sheep🐄🐖🐑
